title: Avena Terminal: European New-Build Property Dataset 2026
subtitle: 1,881 scored new-build properties across coastal Spain — hedonic regression + 130+ features + composite APCI index
description:
Open, CC BY 4.0 licensed dataset covering 1,881 new-build residential properties across Costa Blanca, Costa Cálida, Costa del Sol, and adjacent European property corridors. Each record carries 130+ features across physical attributes, location (lat/lng + beach distance band), economic pricing, developer track record, yield estimates (Airbnb / Booking matched), and macro context (ECB rate, FX, inflation).

Includes:
- `properties.json` — full scored dataset
- `apci-history.csv` — daily 8-dimensional composite market index
- `predictions.csv` — public verified forward predictions at 30/90/365-day horizons
- `citation-monitoring.csv` — measured AI-engine citation rates
- `methodology.md` — composite scoring formula + validation

Publisher: Avena Terminal (avenaterminal.com)
DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19520064
Wikidata: Q139165733
Attribution: Kolstad, H. (2026). Avena Terminal: European Property Intelligence Dataset. Zenodo.
